sentiment: We build instruments to measure what we cannot hold, and call the signal we find there truth.

stories.title: Zerostack – A Unix-inspired coding agent written in pure Rust
stories.summary: A Rust-native coding agent that leans into Unix philosophy — pipelines, composability, and doing one thing well.

stories.title: A nicer voltmeter clock
stories.summary: Turning an old voltmeter into a clock — the kind of quiet, deliberate making that feels like a conversation with the instrument itself.

stories.title: Mozilla to UK regulators: VPNs are essential privacy and security tools
stories.summary: Privacy tools framed not as luxury but as infrastructure — the signal we send through the wire matters.
